scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm -w @neuroverso/backend run build && npm -w @neuroverso/frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @neuroverso/backend run typecheck && npm -w @neuroverso/frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w @neuroverso/backend run test && npm -w @neuroverso/frontend run test
